risk_type: BOLA (Broken Object Level Authorization): Unauthorized access to sensitive data via ID manipulation.

suggestions: Conduct regular penetration testing focused on authorization flaws;Implement automated security testing in CI/CD pipeline;Use API security gateways with built-in BOLA protection;Implement rate limiting per user to detect enumeration attacks;Provide security awareness training to developers on OWASP API Security Top 10

risk_type: Insecure API Key Management: Keys hardcoded in client-side code or public repos.
detected_indicators: API keys found in public GitHub repositories;Keys visible in client-side JavaScript code;Keys exposed in mobile app binaries;Leaked keys in error messages or logs;Unauthorized API usage from unknown sources
mitigation: Implement secure secret management using HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager;Rotate API keys regularly (minimum quarterly);Use environment variables and never hardcode credentials;Implement key scanning tools in CI/CD pipeline (e.g. GitGuardian TruffleHog);Revoke compromised keys immediately and audit their usage
